response.justification: Bogdan is a very strong candidate with multiple Staff-level roles and deep experience in building high-throughput distributed systems. Critically, his most recent role at re:cinq involves building infrastructure for AI agents and agentic workflows, which is a perfect and rare match for the core responsibility of this position. While his resume lacks any mention of Python, a stated "must-have," his polyglot background and direct experience in the AI-native domain make him a compelling candidate who can likely bridge this gap quickly.
strengths: Direct, recent experience building infrastructure for AI agents and agentic workflows.
Proven track record in high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Strong ownership mindset demonstrated by founding a multi-year open-source project and holding multiple Staff Engineer titles.
concerns: The resume shows no experience with Python, which is listed as a "must-have" technical skill.
The start date for his current, most relevant role is listed as a future date (April 2025), requiring clarification on the timeline and depth of his experience.
While his seniority is evident, the resume lacks explicit examples of driving technical strategy and managing cross-functional stakeholders.
